CustomField.formula: IF ( AND(ISPICKVAL( SolutionType__c , "Newslever"), OR(CONTAINS(Name, 'Newslever Base'),CONTAINS(Name, 'Newslever - Additional')), NOT(OR(CONTAINS(Name, 'Newslever Base - Annual'),CONTAINS(Name, 'Newslever Base - Monthly'))) ) , 'true' ,'false')
CustomField.label: Is Newslever Product
